name: Lentil Soup I
recipeIngredient: 1 large Carrot, cut into bite-sized pieces
1 stalk Celery, cut into bite-sized pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the lentils and place them in a soup kettle. Cover with 8 cups of water.
2. Bring to a boil.
3. Cut the sausage into pieces and add to the lentils. Cook slowly for 45 minutes.
4. In a separate pan, sauté garlic, onion, celery, and carrot in olive oil. Add salt, pepper, crushed tomatoes, and marjoram.
5. Cook for about 20 minutes until the vegetables are tender.
6. Add the cooked vegetables to the lentils.
7. Simmer together for an additional 10 minutes, or until the lentils and vegetables are tender.
